# Refund Processing Time

The refund processing time begins once a returned item reaches the warehouse, where it is inspected within two business days. If approved, refunds are processed to the original payment method within five to seven business days, with an additional three days for bank transfers due to variable settlement times. Store-credit refunds are applied instantly post-inspection. Customers who do not see their refunds after ten business days are advised to contact support with their order number for assistance in tracing the transaction.

[Source: returns_policy.md#refund-processing-time]
